title: Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates:
Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates!
